vwap.ref: param sweep S-VWAP-SWEEP-DISPATCH (issue #1569) — DRAFT, pending Ben approval
vwap.summary: Proposed SL_STD_MULT_DEFAULT 0.5σ → 0.3σ based on 12-combo ENTRY×SL sweep: 16 windows × 14 days, 365d 5m BTCUSDT, seed=42. ENTRY=1.0/SL=0.3 mean_total_r=+4.88 (rank 1/12); current ENTRY=1.0/SL=0.5 mean_total_r=-0.46 (rank 9/12). SL tier is decisive: all SL=0.3 configs in top-4 regardless of ENTRY. Tight stops cut losing long trades shorter while preserving short-side gains. R:R changes from 2:1 to 3.33:1 at ENTRY=1.0σ. ENTRY_STD_THRESHOLD unchanged at 1.0σ. Tier-3 change — requires Ben approval before deploy.

Reverted ENTRY_STD_THRESHOLD 1.5σ → 1.0σ (undoing PR #1205) and SL_STD_MULT_DEFAULT 0.75σ → 0.5σ (undoing PR #1183). The 2026-05-17 backtest sweep across 3.16 years of BTCUSDT 5m with the HTF 4h ±2% gate present showed V_1175_htf_only (1.0σ entry, 0.5σ SL) Total R +411.8 vs V_PROD (1.5σ, 0.75σ SL) +133.1 — 3× advantage on the same dataset. The 2026-05-15 #1200 sweep that justified 1.5σ was run without the HTF gate; once the gate is present the optimum shifts. SL widening hurt in both gate regimes.

Wired regime-classifier-baseline-v0 as a shadow predictor on VWAP signals (zero production effect — predictions logged to runtime_logs/shadow_predictions.jsonl only). Promoted to `shadow` stage via trainer-vm-diag #1203. Macro_f1=0.33 on n=4147, f1_range=0.62 — gathering 30 days of data to correlate model-says-range with VWAP winners

Raised ENTRY_STD_THRESHOLD 1.0σ → 1.5σ following issue #1200 threshold sweep (8 random 30-day windows, May 2025-April 2026): 1.5σ mean Sharpe 0.015 vs 1.0σ 0.011, mean total R 6.38 vs 6.02, 4/8 positive windows vs 3/8. Cadence drops ~30% (387 → 295 trades/30d). Same ordering as the 38-month V6 experiment, so not regime-overfit

Added min_r_for_vwap_cross (0.25R) + min_hold_minutes_for_vwap_cross (10m) gates on the vwap_cross close path — suppresses micro-R exits from VWAP-drifts-to-price (3/6 closes on 2026-05-14 exited at R-capture 0.009-0.085, net loss after fees)
Raised SL_STD_MULT 0.5→0.75 + added ATR floor on stop distance — reduces premature SL hits on volatile bars
Fixed order_package() SL always falling back to 2% flat stop regardless of signal SL
Added 4h EMA-200 ±2% HTF trend gate — backtest Sharpe -0.39→+2.47, walk-forward OOS +0.22→+1.10
Changed timeframe 15m→5m for faster mean-reversion signal cadence

turtle_soup.summary: Cadence pair: min_sweep_buffer_bps=10, tp1_at_r=1.00, setup_lookback_bars=4 — OOS Sharpe +1.22→+2.48
Tightened atr_stop_mult 0.35→0.30 (+0.53 Sharpe full-sample, +0.97 OOS, no cadence cost)

ict_scalp_5m.summary: Restored enabled=true after PR #1358's unauthorised disable. 90-day re-validation on Dec 2025-Feb 2026 BTCUSDT 5m: 54 trades, 59.3% win rate, +0.382 R expectancy, +20.6 R total, 4.6 R max DD (17 TP / 11 SL / 26 timeout). Clears the PR #1156 pre-live gate decisively — per-trade Sharpe 0.401 just below the 0.5 strict threshold, but annualized Sharpe ~5.94 passes the OR path by 4×. Full incident record: docs/sprint-logs/S-AUDIT-PIPELINE-2026-05-17.md § Addendum

v2 promotion to enabled=true after pre-live gate cleared (issues #1153 + #1154): 59.3% win rate, +0.301 R expectancy, max DD 3.47R on 90 days of fresh BTCUSDT 5m candles. Strategy uses wick rejection + HTF 1h EMA-20 bias + displacement 1.3 × ATR

fvg_range_15m.ref: Promote shadow -> live on bybit_1 demo (operator policy: paper/demo always execute) - Tier-3, operator-approved
fvg_range_15m.summary: Promoted execution: shadow -> live. Routed to the bybit_1 DEMO account ONLY (paper money) - no real-money risk; NOT added to real-money bybit_2 (that stays a separate Tier-3 gate). Operator directive: paper/demo accounts exist to test strategies, so they execute rather than log data-only. Now builds its live confirmation via real demo execution instead of shadow logging.

fvg_range_15m.ref: S-STRAT-IMPROVE FVG-range (this PR) — DRAFT, Tier-3, execution: shadow
fvg_range_15m.summary: New strategy wired execution: shadow on bybit_1 (demo) for live data collection. FVG mean-reversion inside a confirmed static horizontal range (range_lookback 48 / touches 4 / ADX<20 / far-boundary target / stop 0.25xATR). Validated on 5.2y BTCUSDT 15m (2021-01..2026-02) net-of-fee: FULL +24.4R, exp +0.363, WR 50.8%, maxDD 3.0R, 57% months positive, both sides net-positive; walk-forward OOS 2024-2026 +21.8R exp +0.518 (stronger than train, no overfit decay); fee-robust (+10.5R at 15bps). Caveat: low frequency (67 trades/5.2y) + edge concentrated in the recent regime (train exp +0.10R) — hence shadow. Evidence: docs/audits/fvg-range-complement-2026-05-30.md.

fade_breakout_4h.ref: Demotion live -> shadow (this PR) - Tier-3, operator-approved
fade_breakout_4h.summary: DEMOTED execution: live -> shadow. The live record showed no edge after the 2026-05-25 promotion: 16 closed trades, 44% win, net -86R (almost all bybit_1 demo; real-money bybit_2 +1.55 over 8 trades). Shadow keeps it running + logging order packages on every routed account but it sends NO live order. Re-promote only on a fresh net-positive live/shadow window. The original backtest that justified the promotion (+64.2R/6yr, monthly_corr 0.035 to trend_donchian) still stands; this is a live-vs-backtest-divergence demotion, not a backtest reversal.

fade_breakout_4h.ref: exit review / time-stop (this PR) — DRAFT, Tier-3
fade_breakout_4h.summary: Added an ~8-day (48-bar) time-decay close to monitor() to restore live↔backtest parity — the validated config used timeout_bars=48 but the live monitor had no time stop (ran timeout=∞), so stalled fades sat open for weeks. 6.2yr 4h walk-forward: timeout=48 is a broad plateau (42-60 net-positive), fee-robust, helps across donchian/trail neighbors; FULL 6yr +73.5R->+87.7R. HONEST framing: the +14R lift is mostly a 2020-2023 (train) effect — OOS 2024-2026 it is neutral-to-slightly-better with marginally lower maxDD. So it is a parity + risk/operational change (caps stalled holds, frees capital), NOT an alpha boost. The 3.5xATR trail + all entry logic are unchanged (tightening the trail or adding partial-TPs was tested and HURTS net — the give-back from the peak is the price of the fat-tail runners that are the edge). Evidence: docs/audits/fade-breakout-complement-2026-05-24.md § time-stop addendum.

squeeze_breakout_4h.ref: Demotion live -> shadow (this PR) - Tier-3, operator-approved
squeeze_breakout_4h.summary: DEMOTED execution: live -> shadow. The month-concentrated-OOS caveat flagged at the 2026-05-25 promotion materialised in the live record: 60 closed trades, 0% win, net -20R (bybit_1 demo -18.7; real-money bybit_2 -1.12 over 3 trades). Shadow keeps it running + logging but it sends NO live order. Re-promote only on a fresh net-positive window. Original promotion evidence: docs/audits/squeeze-breakout-complement-2026-05-24.md.

htf_pullback_trend_2h.summary: Replaced the saturating confidence = min((close-mid)/atr, 1.0) — which pinned confidence to 1.0 on every package because the close is ~always >= 1 ATR from the slow midline — with a blended [0,1] score: 50% trend strength (ATR-from-midline, normalised over ~2 ATR) + 50% pullback quality (how deep into the actionable pullback zone the entry sits). Metadata-only change: confidence is NOT a sizing input and NOT part of the intent-multiplexer selection key; entry/SL/TP geometry is unchanged. Makes confidence usable for the dashboard, confidence-weighting analysis, and ML features.

htf_pullback_trend_2h.ref: Promote shadow -> live on bybit_1 demo (operator policy: paper/demo always execute) - Tier-3, operator-approved
htf_pullback_trend_2h.summary: Promoted execution: shadow -> live. Routed to the bybit_1 DEMO account ONLY (paper money) - no real-money risk; graduation to real-money bybit_2 stays a separate Tier-3 gate. Operator directive: paper/demo accounts exist to test strategies, so they execute rather than log data-only. Now builds its live confirmation via real demo execution instead of shadow logging.

htf_pullback_trend_2h.ref: Overnight strategy-research campaign (this PR) - DRAFT, Tier-3, execution: shadow
htf_pullback_trend_2h.summary: New strategy wired execution: shadow on bybit_1 (demo) for live data collection. HTF-pullback trend-follower: HTF Donchian-40 uptrend gate, buy a pullback into the lower 0.5 of the recent 10-bar range, wide Chandelier ATR trail (trail_mult 5.0). Validated on 5y BTCUSDT 2h (2021-2026): net-of-fee walk-forward IS +32.7R / OOS +22.4R (exp +0.14 R/trade), 3-fold robust (+30/+42/+8), fee-robust (+67R at 15bps), additive to the live roster (monthly corr 0.20-0.54). Routed to the DEMO account ONLY; NOT on bybit_2 until operator promotes shadow -> live. Evidence: docs/research/overnight-strategy-research-2026-06-01.md; harness scripts/backtest_pullback.py.

trend_donchian.summary: Live trend_donchian entry floor raised 0.30 -> 0.60. M8 canonical sweep (scripts/ml/strategy_tune_sweep.py) under OOS + 3-fold anchored walk-forward at the live 1h/trail-5.0/long-only params (BTC 2021-2026) found 0.30 net-positive in only 2/3 folds (loses the 2025-26 regime); 3/3 robustness begins at 0.60 (OOS net Σ 34.9->53.6 R, expectancy 0.111->0.215, maxDD 22.3->12.9 R). 0.60 is the conservative onset of the uniformly-robust 0.60-0.90 band. Evidence: docs/sprint-logs/S-M8-STRATEGY-TUNING-S3.md, trainer-vm-diag #3179.

Live trend_donchian re-tuned to the overnight-research OOS-best corner: timeframe 2h->1h, trail_mult 3.5->5.0 (donchian 20 / atr_stop 2.5 unchanged). SUPERSEDES the 2026-05-24 S9 1h->2h walk-forward migration: the 2026-06-01 campaign (357 backtests, 3-fold robust) found 1h/trail5.0 is OOS-best (+43.8R OOS / +42.4R IS, 3-fold +14/+54/+24) — it tested the wide trail (~5.0 lifts net R in every family; default 3.0-3.5 cuts the fat-tail runners that ARE the trend edge) that the S9 analysis never did, and at trail 5.0 the 1h timeframe wins. The recent live 0%-win window was a ~1-month ranging regime + the re-entry storm (fixed by the bar-close debounce, #2548), not a disproven edge. Live on bybit_2 (real) + bybit_1 (demo).

trend_donchian.ref: M20 E3 — ML exit head LIVE (exit-head-donchian-1h-v1, below_half_r@tau0.10), operator-approved Tier-3
trend_donchian.summary: Declared exit_head_model/threshold/action: the monitor closes a position when the advisory-stage LightGBM exit head reads P(holding pays) < 0.10 AND the position is below +0.5R at bar close (proven trades are never touched - the chandelier trail owns them). Evidence: E1.5 purged walk-forward beats actual exits on net_R AND maxDD AND net_R/pos-day in 5/5 folds incl. the 2023/2024 trend years (aggregate 133.9 vs 73.7 net_R at ~half the drawdown/hold time); beats the swept hard levers everywhere; live n=15 sign-agrees. Live influence additionally gated on the mirrored artifact's stage=advisory (promotion gate). Rollback: delete the three exit_head_* lines (and/or demote the artifact stage).

trend_donchian_1h.ref: Retired (enabled:false) — A/B config adopted into live (this PR) - Tier-3
trend_donchian_1h.summary: trend_donchian_1h disabled (enabled:false). Its sole purpose was to validate 1h/trail5.0 against the live 2h flagship; that validation is now ADOPTED — the live trend_donchian was re-tuned to exactly this config (1h/donchian20/trail5.0) in the same PR. Keeping it enabled would double-fire identical 1h breakouts on bybit_1 (demo runs both). Block retained as the A/B record; the live strategy now collects 1h/5.0 data directly on both demo + real.

trend_donchian_1h.ref: Overnight strategy-research campaign (this PR) - DRAFT, Tier-3, execution: shadow
trend_donchian_1h.summary: New strategy instance wired execution: shadow on bybit_1 (demo). Faster-TF/wider-trail A/B of the live 2h trend_donchian: 1h candles, donchian 20, trail_mult 5.0, reusing the trend_donchian unit via its own config. Validated on 5y BTCUSDT (2021-2026): net-of-fee walk-forward IS +42.4R / OOS +43.8R (near-symmetric, 730 trades), net-positive in all three 2y folds (+14/+54/+24), fee-robust (+55R at 15bps), only 0.46 monthly-return corr to the live 2h trend (additive). Routed to the DEMO account ONLY; the live 2h strategy is unchanged. Evidence: docs/research/overnight-strategy-research-2026-06-01.md.

mes_trend_long_1d.ref: Promote shadow -> live on ib_paper (operator policy: paper accounts always execute) - Tier-3, operator-approved
mes_trend_long_1d.summary: Promoted execution: shadow -> live on the IBKR ib_paper (PAPER money) account. Operator directive: paper/demo accounts exist to TEST strategies, so a strategy routed to a paper account must execute, not sit data-only. No real-money risk (ib_paper is paper money); promotion to the REAL-money IB account (ib_live) remains a separate Tier-3 gate. The strategy keeps collecting live-MES data, now via real paper execution rather than shadow logging. It only fires on a daily Donchian-30 breakout, so trades remain infrequent.

mes_trend_long_1d.ref: Overnight strategy-research campaign (this PR) - DRAFT, Tier-3, execution: shadow
mes_trend_long_1d.summary: New strategy wired execution: shadow on the IBKR ib_paper account. MES daily LONG-ONLY trend-follower: Donchian 30 / trail_mult 4.0 on the 1d candle, reusing the trend_donchian unit with short signals suppressed (the equity-index edge is long-only). Validated on SPX500-CFD (the proxy, 2020-2026): long-only trend net-positive IS+OOS across three independent families (trend/TSMOM/MA-cross), near-zero correlation to the BTC roster, tiny drawdown (2-7R). CAVEAT - validated on the CFD proxy, NOT live MES (short ~16mo history); shadow collects the live-instrument data needed before any promotion. Routed to ib_paper (IBKR paper) ONLY; never real money. Evidence: docs/research/overnight-strategy-research-2026-06-01.md (PERF-20260531-001).

trend_donchian_sol.ref: trend_donchian_sol created — PROP alt variant (PB-20260616-004), Tier-3 draft
trend_donchian_sol.summary: New prop-account variant of trend_donchian on SOLUSDT, routed to the Breakout manual-bridge account. The trend_donchian-on-alts +EV finding (Binance-spot research) re-validated on real Bybit linear-perp 5m + the Breakout daily-swap holding cost + a 4-fold walk-forward (runtime_logs/prop_eval/2026-06-17-validate-real/): robust PASS (pre-swap realised +$2,150, 15% drag, funded 12-mo EV +$1,693 @1.5% risk / 94% P(net>0), 4/4 OOS folds). Reuses the trend_donchian unit; execution: live (emits supervised DXTrade tickets). Both-sides to match the validation (a long-only re-validation is the recommended refinement).

Flipped to long_only: true after the Breakout daily-swap long-only A/B: SOL's edge HOLDS long-only (pre-swap +$1,325 -> post +$1,158; funded 12-mo EV +$1,131 @1.5%, 86% P>0; 4/4 OOS folds, cleaner per-fold dispersion). The live builder (_trend_donchian_variant_builder) now suppresses shorts. Matches the BTC flagship's directional discipline.

trend_donchian_sol.ref: M20 E3 — ML exit head LIVE (exit-head-donchian-1h-v1, below_half_r@tau0.10), operator-approved Tier-3
trend_donchian_sol.summary: Declared exit_head_model/threshold/action: the monitor closes a position when the advisory-stage LightGBM exit head reads P(holding pays) < 0.10 AND the position is below +0.5R at bar close (proven trades are never touched - the chandelier trail owns them). Evidence: E1.5 purged walk-forward beats actual exits on net_R AND maxDD AND net_R/pos-day in 5/5 folds incl. the 2023/2024 trend years (aggregate 133.9 vs 73.7 net_R at ~half the drawdown/hold time); beats the swept hard levers everywhere; live n=15 sign-agrees. Live influence additionally gated on the mirrored artifact's stage=advisory (promotion gate). Rollback: delete the three exit_head_* lines (and/or demote the artifact stage).

Fleet-wide config-exact sweep (runtime_logs/m20_fleet/2026-07-12): the 12-bar <0R stale-stop beats-or-ties base on net_R AND maxDD in 6/6 yearly walk-forward folds (2021-2026), vs 4/6 for the shipped 8-bar cell. Same conditional shape (close only when still below 0R at bar close); the longer patience window keeps more eventual winners. ETH stays at 8 (its 12-bar cell scored 3/6).

trend_donchian_eth.ref: trend_donchian_eth created — PROP alt variant shadow (PB-20260616-004), Tier-3 draft
trend_donchian_eth.summary: New prop-account variant of trend_donchian on ETHUSDT, routed to the Breakout manual-bridge account. Gate = marginal PASS: the Breakout daily swap eats 57% of the realised gross (pre +$671 -> post +$285); funded 12-mo EV +$1,050 @1.5% (4/4 OOS folds) but +EV only at risk>=1.0%. Shipped execution: shadow to soak on the real prop feed before live ticket emission.

trend_donchian_eth.ref: trend_donchian_eth — stays TWO-SIDED + promoted SHADOW → LIVE (PRs #3848/#3852, Tier-3, operator-approved)
trend_donchian_eth.summary: The long-only A/B FLIPPED ETH negative (pre +$23 -> post -$181; EV@1.5% +$415/66%, only 3/4 folds, fold-1 -$166) — ETH's edge is short-side-dependent, so it keeps both sides (no long_only). Promoted shadow -> live (operator-approved): emits supervised prop tickets like SOL; the operator gates each placement, so the marginal-but-consistent edge is run live on a manual-bridge ping (reversible to shadow with one flip).

trend_donchian_eth.ref: M20 E3 — ML exit head LIVE (exit-head-donchian-1h-v1, below_half_r@tau0.10), operator-approved Tier-3
trend_donchian_eth.summary: Declared exit_head_model/threshold/action: the monitor closes a position when the advisory-stage LightGBM exit head reads P(holding pays) < 0.10 AND the position is below +0.5R at bar close (proven trades are never touched - the chandelier trail owns them). Evidence: E1.5 purged walk-forward beats actual exits on net_R AND maxDD AND net_R/pos-day in 5/5 folds incl. the 2023/2024 trend years (aggregate 133.9 vs 73.7 net_R at ~half the drawdown/hold time); beats the swept hard levers everywhere; live n=15 sign-agrees. Live influence additionally gated on the mirrored artifact's stage=advisory (promotion gate). Rollback: delete the three exit_head_* lines (and/or demote the artifact stage).

eth_pullback_2h.ref: Tier-3 (operator-directed): raise ETH risk on bybit_2 to clear the Bybit 0.01 ETH minimum order
eth_pullback_2h.summary: Raised eth_pullback_2h risk_pct 0.3 -> 0.6. On the small (~$100) bybit_2 real-money test account the effective per-trade risk (account 0.01 x strategy 0.3 = 0.003 = 0.3% equity) sized ETH below Bybit's 0.01 ETH minimum order (~0.0084 ETH at a 2.5xATR(2h) ~$36 stop, ETH ~$1730), so the orders were rejected as sub-minimum and never opened. 0.6 (= 0.006 = 0.6% equity/trade) sizes ~0.0167 ETH at current vol, clearing 0.01 with ~67% ATR headroom; per-trade risk stays ~$0.60, well inside the account's 5% daily-loss cap. risk_pct is shared with bybit_1 (demo/paper), which also sizes 2x larger there (benign - paper money, R-multiples invariant). Strategy-level bump chosen because there is no per-(account,strategy) override and the account-level risk_pct would hit all 5 real-money strategies. ROLLBACK: restore risk_pct: 0.3.

eth_pullback_prop_2h.ref: Tier-3 (operator-approved live promotion) — swap-robust prop variant (eth-pullback-prop-swap-aware-2026-06-25.md)
eth_pullback_prop_2h.summary: Created eth_pullback_prop_2h: eth_pullback_2h's entries with swap-robust exits (tp_r 50->6, trail_mult 5.0->3.5) for the Breakout venue. Routed to breakout_1 as execution: shadow (observe-only soak). CORRECTION: the first pass used an assumed 0.09%/day swap; Breakout's help centre confirms the real swap is 0.033%/day. At the real rate the funded-EV gate is STRONG: realised post-swap +$421 over 5y (drag 32%), 12-mo EV +$603 @75.9% P(net>0), ROI/fees 4.2, walk-forward 4/4 folds EV-positive; realised break-even swap is 0.10%/day = 3x the real rate (large cost-model safety margin). The live eth_pullback_2h exits are also +EV on Breakout at the real rate (+$166); this variant is preferred for lower drag + bigger margin. PROMOTED shadow->live the same day (operator-approved Tier-3); the original eth_pullback_2h was also routed live to breakout_1. Prop 'live' emits a manual ticket the operator places.

trend_donchian_sol_prop.ref: Unit C Phase 0 (DRAFT Tier-3) — swap-robust prop exit variant (prop-dynamic-exits-faster-banking-DESIGN.md § 5)
trend_donchian_sol_prop.summary: Created trend_donchian_sol_prop: trend_donchian_sol's entries (1h SOLUSDT, long-only) with the proven eth_pullback_prop_2h swap-robust exits (trail_mult 5.0->3.5, tp_r 50 sentinel->6.0 real cap). On the Breakout daily-swap prop venue hold time is the cost driver, so the let-winners-run profile is the wrong exit geometry. Wired (builder/registry/multiplexer/priorities) + routed to breakout_1 as execution: shadow (observe-only soak — logs order packages, emits no prop ticket). NOT a live promotion: the prop EV/survival gate (account_compat_matrix -> run_ev_montecarlo under breakout.yaml; sol +$696 / P0.79 ROUTE) must show strict net-$ improvement vs the single-far-target baseline without a worse p_breach; promotion shadow->live is operator-gated Tier-3. ROLLBACK: remove the block + the breakout_1 routing + the wiring.

trend_donchian_eth_prop.ref: Unit C Phase 0 (DRAFT Tier-3) — swap-robust prop exit variant (prop-dynamic-exits-faster-banking-DESIGN.md § 5)
trend_donchian_eth_prop.summary: Created trend_donchian_eth_prop: trend_donchian_eth's entries (1h ETHUSDT, two-sided — ETH's edge is short-side-dependent) with the proven eth_pullback_prop_2h swap-robust exits (trail_mult 5.0->3.5, tp_r 50 sentinel->6.0 real cap). Wired + routed to breakout_1 as execution: shadow (observe-only soak). NOT a live promotion: the prop EV/survival gate (account_compat_matrix -> run_ev_montecarlo under breakout.yaml; eth +$1,205 / P0.87 ROUTE) must show strict net-$ improvement vs the single-far-target baseline without a worse p_breach; promotion shadow->live is operator-gated Tier-3. ROLLBACK: remove the block + the breakout_1 routing + the wiring.

xauusd_trend_1h.summary: enabled true->false: explicit disable of silent-enabled debris -- only routed account oanda_practice shelved since 2026-06-12 (BL-20260611-007); zero audit events while loaded. Edge preserved for re-enable; gold covered by mgc_trend_1h + GLD.
